name: Creamed Soup Mix
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Instant nonfat dry milk powder
recipeInstructions:
3 cups of this mix equals the equivalent of nine 10 oz cans of soup.
Combine all ingredients in a bowl and transfer to an airtight container for storage.
To prepare, use 1/3 cup of the mix with 1 1/4 cups water in a saucepan. Cook over medium heat while stirring until thickened.
Add 1/4 cup chopped celery or 1/4 cup chopped fresh mushrooms if desired.
1/3 cup of this mix contains 96 calories, is equivalent to one starch/bread exchange, has 18 grams carbohydrate, 5 grams protein, trace fat, and 310 mg sodium.
Adapted from Exchanges For All Occasions by Marion Franz, 3rd ed., 1993.
